name: BasicAI
description: BasicAI — Data annotation platform for computer vision and NLP training data with labeling workflows and QA tools.

seo.title: BasicAI — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: BasicAI: BasicAI — Data annotation platform for computer vision and NLP training data with labeling workflows and QA tools.

when_to_use: Bounding box annotation for computer vision training
NLP text labeling with QA workflow for LLM datasets
Video segmentation annotation for autonomous driving
RLHF data collection with human preference labeling
Multi-annotator consensus pipeline for high-quality labels

pros: Clean labeling UI for CV and NLP
Cheaper than Scale AI or Labelbox
review.verdict: A credible budget alternative to Scale and Labelbox, especially for teams willing to self-host Xtreme1.
review.best_for: ML teams needing affordable labeling for CV/NLP or self-hosted annotation
review.not_for: Enterprises wanting white-glove workforce management and deep QA SLAs
